expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: heatmap highlighting effect scenarios cover activation, persistence, and reset behavior
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus triad and includes dedicated sections and scenarios for each: “Activation (how highlight is triggered)”, “Persistence (whether/how highlight remains across interactions)”, and “Reset (how highlight clears)”. It also provides a “Benchmark expectation coverage statement” enumerating coverage for Activation/Persistence/Reset.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “Phase 4a — Subcategory Draft Focus Coverage Check” and claims contract alignment: “subcategory-only… scenarios with atomic nested steps and observable verification leaves,” plus “subcategory-first (no canonical top-layer categories)”. The structure shown is subcategory → scenarios → nested steps → observable outcomes, consistent with the Phase 4a contract description in execution_notes.md.
